De Bruijn Graph Assembly

Build a De Bruijn graph from k-mers, detect cycles and repeats, and collapse paths into contigs

3

Nodes = 2-mers  ·  Edges = 3-mers

ACGTAC
CGTACG
GTACGT
Nodes4
Edges4
Cycle nodes4
Repeat nodes0
Repeat edges4
Nodes
Normal
In a cycle
Repeat junction
Cycle + repeat
Edges
Normal
Repeat (×>1, dashed)
